Conditioner Keratin & Argan Oil Spa Hair Treatment Therapy is a premium hair care product designed to provide deep nourishment and rejuvenation for your hair. This conditioner combines the powerful benefits of keratin and argan oil, two well-known ingredients that work together to repair, hydrate, and enhance the health of your hair.

Keratin Infusion:

  • Keratin is a protein that naturally makes up the structure of your hair. The conditioner infuses hair with keratin, which helps to rebuild damaged strands, reduce frizz, and improve the overall texture.

  • It can help restore strength to weak, brittle hair, promoting healthier, shinier hair with less breakage.

  • Keratin helps to smooth the hair cuticle, making hair feel softer and look more polished.

Argan Oil:

  • Known as "liquid gold," argan oil is rich in vitamins (E and A), essential fatty acids, and antioxidants, which help to hydrate and nourish the hair.

  • It helps to replenish moisture, leaving hair soft, shiny, and more manageable, while also preventing dryness and frizz.

  • Argan oil can also help to repair damage from heat styling, environmental stress, and chemical treatments, making it great for color-treated hair.

Spa-Like Treatment:

  • This conditioner provides a luxurious, spa-like experience, offering salon-quality results from the comfort of your home.

  • It deeply conditions hair, adding softness, smoothness, and shine without weighing it down.

Deep Hydration & Moisture Lock:

  • Both keratin and argan oil provide intense hydration, helping to lock moisture into the hair shaft. This is particularly beneficial for dry, coarse, or damaged hair, providing long-lasting softness and manageability.

  • Argan oil helps to seal moisture into the hair, preventing further dryness and split ends.

Frizz Control & Smoothing:

  • The combination of keratin and argan oil helps to smooth the hair cuticle, providing frizz control and a sleek, shiny finish.

  • It works to tame unruly hair, making it more manageable and easier to style.

Restores Shine and Softness:

  • With regular use, this conditioner can restore the natural shine and softness to your hair, giving it a healthy, vibrant look.

  • It also helps to improve the elasticity and overall strength of your hair, reducing the likelihood of damage.

Suitable for All Hair Types:

  • Whether your hair is straight, curly, wavy, or color-treated, this conditioner is designed to nourish and restore all hair types.

  • It is especially beneficial for dry, frizzy, or chemically treated hair, offering a way to revive and rejuvenate tired strands.

Protects Against Heat Damage:

  • The conditioning properties of keratin and argan oil help protect hair from damage caused by heat styling tools like blow dryers, straighteners, and curling irons.

This combination therapy works synergistically by using three different mechanisms to lower blood pressure and maintain a healthy cardiovascular system.

Uses of Cilnidipine 10mg, Olmesartan Medoxomil 40mg, & Chlorthalidone 12.5mg:

Management of Hypertension: This combination is primarily used for the management of high blood pressure (hypertension), helping to keep blood pressure within a healthy range.

Prevention of Cardiovascular Events: Helps reduce the risk of complications from high blood pressure, such as stroke, heart failure, and kidney damage.

Effective Blood Pressure Control: Ideal for patients who are not adequately controlled by a single antihypertensive agent or need a combination of drugs for better blood pressure management.

Chlorthalidone 12.5mg
cautions: Pregnancy - Cilnidipine 10mg & Olmesartan Medoxomil 40mg & Chlorthalidone 12.5mg tablet is not recommended for use in pregnant women. Consult your doctor before taking.

Breastfeeding - Cilnidipine 10mg & Olmesartan Medoxomil 40mg & Chlorthalidone 12.5mg tablet is not recommended for use in breastfeeding women as it may pass through the breastmilk to the baby. Consult your doctor before taking.
Driving and using machines - Avoid alcohol consumption as it may aggravate the side effects of Cilnidipine 10mg & Olmesartan Medoxomil 40mg & Chlorthalidone 12.5mg tablet

Kidney - Cilnidipine 10mg & Olmesartan Medoxomil 40mg & Chlorthalidone 12.5mg is not recommended in patients with anuria (failure of the kidneys to produce urine). It should be used with caution in patients with severe renal disease. Consult your doctor before taking

Liver - Cilnidipine 10mg & Olmesartan Medoxomil 40mg & Chlorthalidone 12.5mg tablet is not recommended for use in patients with liver failure and it should be used with caution in patients with mild to moderate liver disease. Consult your doctor before taking
Allergy - Do not take, if you are allergic to Chlorthalidone, Cilnidipine and Olmesartan or any other ingredients of this medicine.

Heart disease - Cilnidipine 10mg & Olmesartan Medoxomil 40mg & Chlorthalidone 12.5mg tablet is not recommended for patients who had cardiogenic shock, myocardial infarction (heart attack), acute unstable angina, and aortic stenosis (blocked blood supply in heart). Consult your doctor for advice.

Others - Cilnidipine 10mg & Olmesartan Medoxomil 40mg & Chlorthalidone 12.5mg tablet is not recommended for use if you:  - have decreased levels of potassium and sodium, - have increased levels of calcium and urea,  - have gout,    have addison’s disease
Before taking Cilnidipine 10mg & Olmesartan Medoxomil 40mg & Chlorthalidone 12.5mg tablet , inform your doctor if you have:  diabetes and problems with adrenal glands
Use in pediatrics:  Safety and efficacy in pediatric patients is not established. Consult your doctor before taking Cilnidipine 10mg & Olmesartan Medoxomil 40mg & Chlorthalidone 12.5mg tablet.

Use in geriatrics: Cilnidipine 10mg & Olmesartan Medoxomil 40mg & Chlorthalidone 12.5mg tablet should be used with caution in elderly patients of 65 years and above. Before taking Cilnidipine 10mg & Olmesartan Medoxomil 40mg & Chlorthalidone 12.5mg tablet, consult your doctor.

This cream combines a corticosteroid (Mometasone Furoate) with an antibiotic (Fusidic Acid) to effectively manage both the inflammatory and infectious aspects of skin disorders. It is primarily used for conditions like eczema, dermatitis, infections, and psoriasis where secondary bacterial infections might occur.

Uses of Mometasone Furoate 0.1% & Fusidic Acid 2% Cream:

Eczema and Dermatitis: Used to treat eczema, contact dermatitis, and other inflammatory skin conditions that are also prone to bacterial infections.

Psoriasis: Helps manage the symptoms of psoriasis, including inflammation, flaking, and redness.

Skin Infections: Treats bacterial infections associated with conditions like impetigo, infected cuts, and scratches.

Dermatitis, including contact dermatitis and seborrheic dermatitis

Patients Requiring Dual Action Treatment: Those who need both anti-inflammatory and antibacterial treatment for skin conditions will benefit from the combination of Mometasone Furoate and Fusidic Acid.
Individuals with viral or fungal skin infections.
Children under the age of 2 without prior medical advice.
People who have shown hypersensitivity or allergic reactions to any of the components of the cream.

Easy Application: The cream is easy to apply, allowing for localized treatment of affected areas without the need for additional dressings or bandages.
Improves Skin Health: By reducing inflammation and fighting bacterial infection, this cream helps restore healthy skin and improves overall skin appearance.

info:
Amlodipine 10 mg tablet is a medication commonly used to treat high blood pressure (hypertension) and certain types of chest pain (angina). It belongs to a class of drugs known as calcium channel blockers.

Primarily prescribed to manage high blood pressure (hypertension) and certain types of chest pain (angina). It helps relax blood vessels, improving blood flow and reducing the heart’s workload. Amlodipine 10 mg Tablet may be prescribed alone or along with other medicines. The dose depends on what you are taking it for and the severity of your condition. You can take it at any time of the day, with or without food, but it is best to take it at about the same time each day. You should take this medicine for as long as it is prescribed for you. Even if you feel well, do not stop this medicine on your own because high blood pressure often has no symptoms. If you stop taking it, your condition may get worse. Keeping yourself active with regular exercise, managing your weight, and eating a healthy diet will also help control your blood pressure.

Uses of Amlodipine 10 mg:

Hypertension (High Blood Pressure):

Amlodipine is widely used to treat high blood pressure by helping to relax the blood vessels, thereby lowering systolic and diastolic blood pressure and reducing the overall workload on the heart.

Angina Pectoris:

Amlodipine is also used to prevent and manage angina (chest pain) caused by reduced blood flow to the heart. It helps improve oxygen delivery to the heart and relieves the discomfort associated with angina.
suitableFor: Adults with high blood pressure (hypertension) to help lower blood pressure and reduce the risk of heart attack and stroke.
Adults with certain types of chest pain (angina) to relieve symptoms by relaxing blood vessels and improving blood flow.
dosage: Amlodipine 10 mg
cautions: Caution is advised when consuming alcohol with Amlong 10 Tablet. Please consult your doctor.

Amlodipine 10 mg Tablet may be unsafe to use during pregnancy. Although there are limited studies in humans, animal studies have shown harmful effects on the developing baby. Your doctor will weigh the benefits and any potential risks before prescribing it to you. Please consult your doctor.
Amlodipine 10 mg Tablet is probably safe to use during breastfeeding. Limited human data suggests that the drug does not represent any significant risk to the baby.

Amlodipine 10 mg Tablet may cause side effects which could affect your ability to drive. Amlodipine 10 mg Tablet may cause side effects such as dizziness, headaches, nausea or tiredness, all of which could affect your ability to concentrate and drive.
Amlodipine 10 mg Tablet is safe to use in patients with kidney disease. No dose adjustment of Amlong 10 Tablet is recommended.

Amlodipine 10 mg Tablet should be used with caution in patients with liver disease. Dose adjustment of Amlong 10 Tablet may be needed. Please consult your doctor. Amlodipine 10 mg Tablet is started at a lower dose in patients with liver disease and further increased slowly with careful monitoring.
benefits: In Prevention of Angina (heart-related chest pain)

Amlodipine 10 mg Tablet relaxes the blood vessels and improves blood flow around your body. This means that more oxygen gets to your heart and reduces the risk of getting chest pain (angina). This medicine should not be used to treat chest pain which is already happening. It is used to prevent or reduce the frequency of angina attacks. This medicine needs to be taken regularly as prescribed for it to work effectively. So, it is important to keep taking it even if you feel well and have no symptoms.
sideEffects: Swelling of the ankles or feet (edema)
productInfo: Amlodipine 10 mg Tablet contains Amlodipine IP 10mg as its active ingredient, which is a calcium channel blocker effective in managing hypertension and angina.
directionsForUse: Take one tablet orally with or without food, as directed by your healthcare provider. Do not exceed the prescribed dose.

A Crepe Bandage is a type of elastic bandage commonly used in medical settings for providing support, compression, and immobilization to injured or sprained areas of the body. It is made from a woven fabric (often cotton) with some elasticity to it, allowing it to stretch and adapt to different parts of the body, such as the joints, arms, legs, or wrists.

Uses of Crepe Bandage (15 cm):

Sprains and Strains:

Crepe bandages are commonly used to support sprained or strained muscles and joints, especially in the ankles, wrists, and elbows. They help limit movement while the injury heals.

Swelling and Inflammation:

The bandage provides compression, which can reduce swelling and inflammation by promoting proper circulation around the affected area.

Post-Surgical Support:

After certain surgical procedures, crepe bandages are used to provide support and stabilization to the affected area while helping control swelling.

It is also used by adults for similar purposes, such as reducing friction, absorbing moisture, and soothing irritated skin. Baby powder typically contains ingredients that are gentle on sensitive skin.

Diaper Rash Prevention:

One of the primary uses of baby powder is to help prevent diaper rash by absorbing moisture from the skin, keeping the diaper area dry and reducing friction.

Absorbing Excess Moisture:

Baby powder can be used to help absorb moisture in areas prone to sweat or friction, such as between folds of skin, underarms, and the neck.

Relieving Skin Irritation:

It helps reduce the discomfort associated with skin irritation and chafing, often caused by excess moisture or friction.

Clindamycin Hydrochloride 300 mg is an antibiotic medication used to treat a variety of bacterial infections. It belongs to the class of drugs known as lincosamide antibiotics and is effective against a range of bacterial infections caused by Gram-positive and some anaerobic bacteria.

Uses of Clindamycin Hydrochloride 300mg:

Skin and Soft Tissue Infections:

Clindamycin is commonly used to treat skin infections like cellulitis, impetigo, and abscesses, caused by bacteria such as Staphylococcus aureus or Streptococcus pyogenes.

Respiratory Tract Infections:

It is used for respiratory infections such as pneumonia, bronchitis, or sinusitis caused by susceptible bacteria.

Bone and Joint Infections:

Clindamycin is prescribed for osteomyelitis (bone infections) and septic arthritis (joint infections) caused by susceptible organisms.

The combination of Glimepiride, Voglibose, and Metformin is used to manage type 2 diabetes in patients who are not adequately controlled by diet, exercise, or metformin alone.

Uses of Glimepiride 1mg & Voglibose 0.2mg & Metformin 500mg (SR):

Management of Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus:

The combination of Glimepiride, Voglibose, and Metformin is used to manage type 2 diabetes in patients who are not adequately controlled by diet, exercise, or metformin alone.

  • Glimepiride helps increase insulin production to reduce blood glucose levels.
  • Voglibose reduces the post-meal blood sugar spikes.
  • Metformin enhances insulin sensitivity and reduces glucose production by the liver.

Post-meal Blood Sugar Control:

Voglibose is particularly effective in preventing postprandial hyperglycemia (spikes in blood glucose after meals), a common issue in type 2 diabetes.

Improved Glycemic Control:

The combination provides better control of both fasting and postprandial blood sugar levels, reducing the risk of long-term complications associated with diabetes, such as nerve damage, kidney problems, and cardiovascular disease.

Patients requiring supplementation with oral hypoglycemics
dosage: One tablet daily or as directed by a healthcare professional

cautions: Not suitable for individuals with type 1 diabetes
Use with caution in patients with renal impairment
Monitor for signs of hypoglycemia
benefits: Helps lower blood sugar levels
Improves insulin sensitivity
Reduces the risk of diabetes-related complications
productInfo: Davapride 1/0.2 VMF Tablet contains Glimepiride, Voglibose, and Metformin combined effectively for improved glycemic control.
directionsForUse: Take one tablet by mouth with meals to reduce gastrointestinal side effects. Follow your doctor's instructions regarding the timing and dosage.

Clobetasol Propionate 0.05% Cream is a potent topical corticosteroid used for the treatment of various skin conditions. It is a prescription medication commonly used to reduce inflammation, redness, and itching associated with a variety of skin disorders.

Uses of Clobetasol Propionate 0.05% Cream:

Psoriasis:

Clobetasol is commonly used to treat psoriasis, particularly plaque psoriasis, where thick, scaly patches of skin develop. It helps reduce the inflammation, scaling, and itching caused by the condition.

Eczema (Atopic Dermatitis):

This cream is often prescribed for eczema, a condition that causes skin inflammation, itching, and redness. Clobetasol helps calm the inflammatory response and reduces skin irritation.

Dermatitis:

It is used for various forms of dermatitis, including contact dermatitis, where skin reacts to allergens or irritants, causing redness, swelling, and itching.

Lichen Planus:

Clobetasol is effective in treating lichen planus, a condition where purplish, itchy bumps appear on the skin. It helps reduce the inflammation and irritation caused by the condition.
